top_signals.title: Russia on track for digital ruble rollout on Sept. 1: Central bank governor
top_signals.summary: EU authorities already preemptively sanctioned Russia’s digital ruble in 2025 as part of measures in response to the country’s war against Ukraine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Carney Keeps North BC Tanker Ban, Signaling Alberta’s Pipeline Will Go South
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced a deal with British Columbia that keeps an oil tanker ban in place for Canada’s north coast, and commits billions of dollars in federal funding for energy, mining and transportation projects.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US Sees 10 Million Barrels Via Hormuz Sapping Iran Oil Leverage - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: US Sees 10 Million Barrels Via Hormuz Sapping Iran Oil Leverage  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan says Strategy's bitcoin sales policy adds 'two-way risk' to crypto markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump's children, stock buying spree in the spotlight
top_signals.summary: Trump gave CNBC an exclusive interview in which he defended the business dealings of his children. And we took a look at his stock market trades last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CFTC’s Selig says Illinois lawmakers ‘decided they know better’ on crypto tax
top_signals.summary: CFTC Chair Michael Selig sharply criticized Illinois' decision to pass a law that puts into place a 0.2% tax on crypto transactions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Burnham backs higher defence spending but rules out ‘crude’ welfare cuts
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham has called for the country to trust him with the public finances stable as he pledged to “take responsibility” for funding Keir Starmer’s controversial Defence Investment Plan. Burnham, who is all-but-certain to enter Number 10 in fewer than three weeks, hit out at “narratives” about him, in a radio interview with LBC which [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: More than 400 dead in Dr. Congo’s spreading Ebola outbreak
top_signals.summary: The highly infectious disease has had a fatality rate of just over 31% since the outbreak was declared in May.
